untranslatable_reason: Signal references specific price levels (e.g., Nifty 9,200) and multi-bar pattern recognition (lower lows formation, counter-trend end detection) that cannot be expressed with single-bar indicators. The 'support_level', 'time_of_lower_lows', and pattern-based entry conditions require either absolute price thresholds (AUTHOR_SILENT) or multi-bar pattern detection logic not available in the indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted structural translation using trend confirmation (price above SMA_20), lower low detection (low < prev_low), and reversal confirmation (close > prev_close). However, the core logic—identifying when a counter-trend correction ends and the main trend resumes—requires historical pattern analysis or explicit support level definition that was marked AUTHOR_SILENT in the original signal. Exit condition uses trend break (close below SMA_20) as a reasonable reversal proxy given no specific exit was defined.
